_publications._publicationTitle: HuR/ELAVL1 drives malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor growth and metastasis.

_contextSnippet: Remarkably, very few metastatic lesions were observed in HuR-depleted cells in contrast to control cells, which formed numerous and large metastatic foci
details: Very few metastatic lesions were observed in HuR-depleted cells in contrast to control cells, which formed numerous and large metastatic foci
